stocks.impact_theory: Ongoing AI demand surge pushes NVDA past $190 amid tame PPI data and US-Iran de-escalation hopes easing oil fears. Economically, strengthens semis supply chain; psychologically, FOMO drives buying. Parallels 2023 ChatGPT boom. Analogies: like pouring gasoline on AI fire; a rising tide lifting all tech boats.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Positive news on AI, X sentiment high, web searches show rising for 10th day, market rally supportive.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% gains on continued AI hype.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short risky, potential 5% loss if breaks higher.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation, competition from AMD, macro slowdown.

stocks.justification: Strong momentum, consistent news flow, high volume.

stocks.impact_theory: Oracle expands deal to 2.8GW fuel cells for AI data centers, up from 1.2GW deploying. Addresses power crunch for AI; psych: validates fuel cell tech. Parallels: GE-Oracle past deals. Analogies: power plug for AI explosion; bridge over energy shortage.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Major partnership announcement, stock +14%, positive X buzz.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 20% upside on AI power theme.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Execution delays, competition, high valuation post-surge.

stocks.justification: Concrete deal news, ties to hot AI infra.

stocks.impact_theory: Second FDA rejection (CRL) for RP1 melanoma drug due to insufficient data, sinks stock 57-64%. Erodes pipeline value; psych: loss of confidence. Parallels: other biotech FDA flops like Geron. Analogies: rug pull on investors; brick wall for approval hopes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: FDA setback news dominant, legal scrutiny, heavy selling.

stocks.justification: Clear negative catalyst, but biotech volatility.

stocks.impact_theory: Reports of Amazon acquiring/buying SpaceX rival Globalstar boosts satellite comm play. Enhances IoT/direct-to-cell; psych: M&A premium. Parallels: ASTS surges. Analogies: chess move in space race; golden ticket for satellite stocks.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Acquisition rumors, ties to Amazon/SpaceX rivalry.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 earnings release amid bank earnings season, market up on PPI. Shows resilience; psych: sector rotation. Parallels: post-2023 SVB strength. Analogies: anchor in stormy seas; bellwether for finance.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat expectations, positive market backdrop.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Rising rates hurt NIM, recession fears.
